name: AllocateOrder
bodySql:
UPDATE inventory_positions
SET allocated_qty = allocated_qty + (
    SELECT SUM(ol.ordered_qty - ol.allocated_qty)
    FROM order_lines ol
    INNER JOIN orders o ON o.id = ol.order_id
    WHERE ol.order_id = @orderId
      AND o.warehouse_id = inventory_positions.warehouse_id
      AND ol.product_id = inventory_positions.product_id
      AND ol.ordered_qty > ol.allocated_qty
)
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM order_lines ol
    INNER JOIN orders o ON o.id = ol.order_id
    WHERE ol.order_id = @orderId
      AND o.warehouse_id = inventory_positions.warehouse_id
      AND ol.product_id = inventory_positions.product_id
      AND ol.ordered_qty > ol.allocated_qty
);
UPDATE order_lines
SET allocated_qty = ordered_qty
WHERE order_id = @orderId;
UPDATE orders
SET status = 'allocated',
    notes = @note
WHERE id = @orderId;
INSERT INTO ops_events (entity_type, entity_id, event_type, event_date, actor_name, details)
VALUES ('order', @orderId, 'allocated', @allocatedDate, @allocatedBy, @note);
SELECT *
FROM order_fulfillment_board
WHERE order_id = @orderId;
SELECT sku, product_name, available_qty, shortage_qty
FROM low_stock_watch
WHERE warehouse_id = (
    SELECT warehouse_id
    FROM orders
    WHERE id = @orderId
)
ORDER BY shortage_qty DESC, sku;

parameters.name: note
parameters.default: Allocation released from Fulfillment Hub sample procedure.
parameters.description: Operational note written back to the order.

description: Allocates all unallocated order lines for one sales order, updates inventory reservations, and returns the refreshed order plus low-stock watch rows for the warehouse.

name: ReceivePurchaseOrder
bodySql:
UPDATE inventory_positions
SET on_hand_qty = on_hand_qty + (
        SELECT SUM(pol.ordered_qty - pol.received_qty)
        FROM purchase_order_lines pol
        INNER JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = pol.purchase_order_id
        WHERE pol.purchase_order_id = @purchaseOrderId
          AND po.warehouse_id = inventory_positions.warehouse_id
          AND pol.product_id = inventory_positions.product_id
    ),
    inbound_qty = inbound_qty - (
        SELECT SUM(pol.ordered_qty - pol.received_qty)
        FROM purchase_order_lines pol
        INNER JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = pol.purchase_order_id
        WHERE pol.purchase_order_id = @purchaseOrderId
          AND po.warehouse_id = inventory_positions.warehouse_id
          AND pol.product_id = inventory_positions.product_id
    )
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM purchase_order_lines pol
    INNER JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = pol.purchase_order_id
    WHERE pol.purchase_order_id = @purchaseOrderId
      AND po.warehouse_id = inventory_positions.warehouse_id
      AND pol.product_id = inventory_positions.product_id
      AND pol.ordered_qty > pol.received_qty
);
UPDATE purchase_order_lines
SET received_qty = ordered_qty
WHERE purchase_order_id = @purchaseOrderId;
UPDATE purchase_orders
SET status = 'received',
    notes = @note
WHERE id = @purchaseOrderId;
INSERT INTO ops_events (entity_type, entity_id, event_type, event_date, actor_name, details)
VALUES ('purchase_order', @purchaseOrderId, 'received', @receivedDate, @receivedBy, @note);
SELECT *
FROM purchase_order_receiving_board
WHERE purchase_order_id = @purchaseOrderId
ORDER BY sku;
SELECT *
FROM low_stock_watch
WHERE warehouse_id = (
    SELECT warehouse_id
    FROM purchase_orders
    WHERE id = @purchaseOrderId
)
ORDER BY shortage_qty DESC, sku;

parameters.name: receivedBy
parameters.description: Receiving actor recorded in ops events.

parameters.name: note
parameters.default: Purchase order fully received from sample procedure.
parameters.description: Operational note written back to the purchase order.

description: Receives all outstanding quantities for a purchase order, moves inbound stock into on-hand inventory, and returns the refreshed receiving board plus warehouse shortage rows.

name: CreateShipment
bodySql:
INSERT INTO shipments (
    id,
    shipment_number,
    order_id,
    carrier_id,
    warehouse_id,
    shipped_date,
    status,
    tracking_number,
    picked_by,
    packed_by
)
SELECT
    @shipmentId,
    @shipmentNumber,
    o.id,
    @carrierId,
    o.warehouse_id,
    @shippedDate,
    'shipped',
    @trackingNumber,
    @pickedBy,
    @packedBy
FROM orders o
WHERE o.id = @orderId;
INSERT INTO shipment_lines (shipment_id, order_line_id, product_id, quantity_shipped, line_total)
SELECT
    @shipmentId,
    ol.id,
    ol.product_id,
    ol.allocated_qty - ol.shipped_qty,
    (ol.allocated_qty - ol.shipped_qty) * ol.unit_price
FROM order_lines ol
WHERE ol.order_id = @orderId
  AND ol.allocated_qty > ol.shipped_qty;
UPDATE inventory_positions
SET on_hand_qty = on_hand_qty - (
        SELECT SUM(ol.allocated_qty - ol.shipped_qty)
        FROM order_lines ol
        INNER JOIN orders o ON o.id = ol.order_id
        WHERE ol.order_id = @orderId
          AND o.warehouse_id = inventory_positions.warehouse_id
          AND ol.product_id = inventory_positions.product_id
    ),
    allocated_qty = allocated_qty - (
        SELECT SUM(ol.allocated_qty - ol.shipped_qty)
        FROM order_lines ol
        INNER JOIN orders o ON o.id = ol.order_id
        WHERE ol.order_id = @orderId
          AND o.warehouse_id = inventory_positions.warehouse_id
          AND ol.product_id = inventory_positions.product_id
    )
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM order_lines ol
    INNER JOIN orders o ON o.id = ol.order_id
    WHERE ol.order_id = @orderId
      AND o.warehouse_id = inventory_positions.warehouse_id
      AND ol.product_id = inventory_positions.product_id
      AND ol.allocated_qty > ol.shipped_qty
);
UPDATE order_lines
SET shipped_qty = allocated_qty
WHERE order_id = @orderId;
UPDATE orders
SET status = 'shipped',
    notes = @note
WHERE id = @orderId;
SELECT *
FROM shipment_manifest_report_source
WHERE shipment_id = @shipmentId
ORDER BY sku;
SELECT *
FROM order_fulfillment_board
WHERE order_id = @orderId;

parameters.name: note
parameters.default: Shipment created from Fulfillment Hub sample procedure.
parameters.description: Operational note written back to the sales order.

description: Creates a shipment for one order, copies all remaining allocated lines into shipment lines, consumes reserved inventory, and returns the manifest rows plus refreshed order status.

name: RecordReturn
bodySql:
UPDATE returns
SET status = @newStatus,
    disposition = @disposition,
    received_date = @processedDate,
    notes = @note
WHERE id = @returnId;
UPDATE inventory_positions
SET on_hand_qty = on_hand_qty + (
    SELECT quantity
    FROM returns r
    WHERE r.id = @returnId
      AND r.warehouse_id = inventory_positions.warehouse_id
      AND r.product_id = inventory_positions.product_id
      AND @disposition = 'restock'
)
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM returns r
    WHERE r.id = @returnId
      AND r.warehouse_id = inventory_positions.warehouse_id
      AND r.product_id = inventory_positions.product_id
      AND @disposition = 'restock'
);
INSERT INTO ops_events (entity_type, entity_id, event_type, event_date, actor_name, details)
VALUES ('return', @returnId, 'processed', @processedDate, @processedBy, @note);
SELECT *
FROM return_queue
WHERE return_id = @returnId;
SELECT *
FROM low_stock_watch
WHERE product_id = (
    SELECT product_id
    FROM returns
    WHERE id = @returnId
)
ORDER BY warehouse_code;

parameters.name: disposition
parameters.description: Disposition such as restock, inspect, or scrap.

parameters.name: note
parameters.default: Return processed from Fulfillment Hub sample procedure.
parameters.description: Operational note written back to the return.

description: Processes one return, optionally restocks inventory when the disposition is restock, and returns the refreshed return queue row plus product shortage rows.

name: RefreshOperationalStats
description: Returns table stats, shortage watch rows, and the live order fulfillment board for planner review.
